data.current_description: Create or update data for a specified dataset in Soda Cloud.
data.summary_suggestion: Create or update dataset in Soda Cloud
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new dataset or updates an existing dataset with the provided data in Soda Cloud. Accepts dataset data as key-value pairs via DatasetInput. Returns a DatasetResponse containing the dataset identifier and status. If the dataset exists, it will be updated with the provided values; if it does not exist, a new dataset will be created.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Added: (1) explicit mention of create vs. update behavior, (2) input schema context (key-value pairs), (3) response schema details, (4) side effects clarifying idempotent vs. creation behavior. This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'getCheckResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. data.current_description: Retrieve data quality check results or details from Soda Cloud.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves data quality check results from Soda Cloud. Supports filtering and querying check results through query parameters. Returns a CheckResultsResponse containing an array of CheckResult objects, each with check name, status, and evaluation details. Use this operation to monitor data quality metrics and verify check execution outcomes.
data.reasoning: Original description is vague about filtering capabilities and return structure.
